categories.name: THERE'S A NATIONAL DAY FOR THAT

questions.clue: The second Monday in February is Clean Out Your this Day, so shake the crumbs out of that keyboard & delete those unused .exes
Write (actually write, on paper) a letter on June 1, the National Day for these alliterative & friendly correspondents
On February 1, I scream, you scream, we all scream for this fancy dessert named for the 49th state

categories.name: THE GREAT AMERICAN READ'S TOP 100 BOOKS

questions.clue: This Harper Lee classic topped the list & was the favorite book of 48 states as well

This author made the list at No. 24 with his epic "The Stand"
Sci-fi entries on the list ranged from Frank Herbert's "Dune" to this much sillier Douglas Adams book
questions.answer: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy

questions.clue: 7 of the top 10 books on the list were written by women, including this series by Diana Gabaldon
